steps: Submit formal tax reclaim request to Citigroup Australia for AUD 138,750 overpaid withholding tax on BHP Group dividend
Provide Norwegian tax residency certificate and reference AU-NO treaty Article 10 specifying 15% maximum rate
Request Citigroup escalate to their Australian tax team with ATO withholding guidance for foreign residents
If custodian disputes, file direct reclaim with ATO referencing treaty-reduced rate entitlement

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
AU Treasury – Income Tax Treaties Table
